name: Freegold Ventures Ltd.
description: Freegold Ventures Ltd. is a Canada-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold and copper-gold properties in Alaska. The company's key projects include the Golden Summit Gold Project, a multi-million ounce gold deposit located near Fairbanks, and the Shorty Creek Copper-Gold Project, a highly prospective copper-gold-silver-cobalt property located northwest of Fairbanks. Freegold is committed to advancing these projects through systematic exploration and drilling programs.
